Package org.eventb.core.ast.tests

Class SourceLocationChecker

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.core.ast.DefaultVisitor
org.eventb.core.ast.tests.SourceLocationChecker
All Implemented Interfaces:
IVisitor, IVisitor2
Direct Known Subclasses:
SourceLocationOriginChecker
public class SourceLocationChecker extends DefaultVisitor
Simple implementation of the AST visitor to check that source locations are correctly nested into each other, reflecting the formula structure.

      public boolean enterBCOMP(AssociativeExpression expr)
      Description copied from interface: IVisitor
      Enters a BCOMP node.
      Specified by:
      enterBCOMP in interface IVisitor
      Overrides:
      enterBCOMP in class DefaultVisitor
      Parameters:
      expr - the node which is entered
      Returns:
      false to prevent visiting the children of the given node, true to continue visiting.
